rules.meaning: Proceed at reduced speed. The applicable speed may come from the H/V rule baseline, a displayed Zs 3, or another applicable operating instruction.
playerAction: Do not assume the exact permitted speed from the green-over-yellow lamps alone.
Read any white Zs 3 numeral and multiply it by ten for km/h.
Where no Zs 3 is displayed, use the route and rule context represented by the simulator.
notes: The website must keep the visual aspect and the numeric speed instruction as separate fields.

rules.recognition: Green over yellow on the main head, accompanied by a white numeral.
playerActionTemplate: Reach {valueTimesTen} km/h by the signal unless the applicable rule defines a different starting point.

rules.recognition: Green and yellow distant lights accompanied by a yellow numeral.
rules.meaningTemplate: Expect {valueTimesTen} km/h at the next main signal or defined location.
playerActionTemplate: Acknowledge PZB when the associated 1000 Hz influence is active.
Brake so that {valueTimesTen} km/h is reached at the required point.

readingOrder: Hp aspect: may I pass this signal?
Zs 3: what speed applies from this signal or defined point?
Vr aspect: what should I expect at the next main signal?
Zs 3v: what speed is announced for that next location?
